mission: Sovereign deploy substrate — EKS/staging, SecOps, fleet health, observability

vision.statement: Sovereign deploy substrate — EKS/staging, SECAS, fleet health, observability

gtmGoals.title: Integrator deploy substrate pilots
gtmGoals.outcome: GR-T2 pilots promote infrastructure with SecOps clearance evidence

productGoals.title: Fleet security clearance
productGoals.outcome: SecOps and ComplianceOps can promote fleet infrastructure with clear evidence and no hidden gating ambiguity
productGoals.measure: SecOps internal Class R sealed and ComplianceOps fleet harness PASS

productGoals.title: Supply-chain trust
productGoals.outcome: Supply-chain gates remain provably green across the fleet deploy substrate

productGoals.title: Operational deploy choreography
productGoals.outcome: Fleet integrators can rely on one coherent deploy and observability substrate for staged promotion
productGoals.measure: Demo walkthrough evidence and fleet health witnesses remain current

productGoals.title: Fleet ops assurance operational
productGoals.outcome: Security, compliance, legal, and all ops lanes run from centralized programme with parallel assurance — product repos never blocked by vendor calendar

milestones.title: Fleet ops assurance operational
milestones.shippableOutcome: All ops functions have owner-routed PRD, harness, and fleet witness; assurance parallel to engineering
